## Meeting Purpose

[1:1 between Jose and Daniel to discuss project progress, team dynamics, and upcoming paternity leave plans.](https://fathom.video/share/ikp5BS7xRwX2bK8rXs1xyf9o3RRUeeeV?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Concerns raised about Esteban's backend code quality; plans made to support him](https://fathom.video/share/ikp5BS7xRwX2bK8rXs1xyf9o3RRUeeeV?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Discussed architecture decisions for Check That, including multi-tenancy and prompt handling](https://fathom.video/share/ikp5BS7xRwX2bK8rXs1xyf9o3RRUeeeV?tab=summary&timestamp=2112.0)
  - [Agreed on timeline: public area ready by end of month, private area feature-complete by early November](https://fathom.video/share/ikp5BS7xRwX2bK8rXs1xyf9o3RRUeeeV?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Jose to finish time series implementation and shift focus to building frontend for private area](https://fathom.video/share/ikp5BS7xRwX2bK8rXs1xyf9o3RRUeeeV?tab=summary&timestamp=1960.0)

## Topics

### Code Quality Concerns

  - [Jose expressed concerns about Esteban's backend code quality](https://fathom.video/share/ikp5BS7xRwX2bK8rXs1xyf9o3RRUeeeV?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Examples: Clerk integration required complete redesign, inefficient syncing implementation](https://fathom.video/share/ikp5BS7xRwX2bK8rXs1xyf9o3RRUeeeV?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Esteban struggles with backend but is fine with frontend](https://fathom.video/share/ikp5BS7xRwX2bK8rXs1xyf9o3RRUeeeV?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Daniel suggested bringing in Jacopo to supervise and support Esteban](https://fathom.video/share/ikp5BS7xRwX2bK8rXs1xyf9o3RRUeeeV?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)

### Project Architecture Decisions

  - [Discussed multi-tenancy approach: users can manage multiple accounts](https://fathom.video/share/ikp5BS7xRwX2bK8rXs1xyf9o3RRUeeeV?tab=summary&timestamp=2112.0)
  - [Prompts will be associated with organizations, authors, and optionally subcategories](https://fathom.video/share/ikp5BS7xRwX2bK8rXs1xyf9o3RRUeeeV?tab=summary&timestamp=2830.0)
  - [Introduced concept of "seed prompts" for normalized subcategories](https://fathom.video/share/ikp5BS7xRwX2bK8rXs1xyf9o3RRUeeeV?tab=summary&timestamp=2644.0)
  - [Planned to add "funnel stage" enum to prompts for leaderboard calculations](https://fathom.video/share/ikp5BS7xRwX2bK8rXs1xyf9o3RRUeeeV?tab=summary&timestamp=3389.0)
  - [Considered future scalability, potentially introducing "trackable" concept for various data types](https://fathom.video/share/ikp5BS7xRwX2bK8rXs1xyf9o3RRUeeeV?tab=summary&timestamp=3697.0)

### Timeline and Next Steps

  - [Aim for public area ready by end of month or early next week](https://fathom.video/share/ikp5BS7xRwX2bK8rXs1xyf9o3RRUeeeV?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Switch focus to private area, aiming for feature-complete by early November](https://fathom.video/share/ikp5BS7xRwX2bK8rXs1xyf9o3RRUeeeV?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Jose to finish time series implementation in next couple of days](https://fathom.video/share/ikp5BS7xRwX2bK8rXs1xyf9o3RRUeeeV?tab=summary&timestamp=1960.0)
  - [Jose to shift focus to building frontend for private area](https://fathom.video/share/ikp5BS7xRwX2bK8rXs1xyf9o3RRUeeeV?tab=summary&timestamp=1960.0)
  - [Daniel to work on seed prompts for subcategories](https://fathom.video/share/ikp5BS7xRwX2bK8rXs1xyf9o3RRUeeeV?tab=summary&timestamp=3924.0)

### Team Dynamics and Hiring

  - [Discussed potential hiring of Jacopo and Isaac](https://fathom.video/share/ikp5BS7xRwX2bK8rXs1xyf9o3RRUeeeV?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
  - [Jacopo more experienced, system/security/performance focused](https://fathom.video/share/ikp5BS7xRwX2bK8rXs1xyf9o3RRUeeeV?tab=summary&timestamp=4275.0)
  - [Isaac more product-oriented, full-stack developer](https://fathom.video/share/ikp5BS7xRwX2bK8rXs1xyf9o3RRUeeeV?tab=summary&timestamp=4275.0)
  - [Daniel considering creating a specific role for Jacopo](https://fathom.video/share/ikp5BS7xRwX2bK8rXs1xyf9o3RRUeeeV?tab=summary&timestamp=4408.0)

### Personal Updates

  - [Jose's wife is 8 months pregnant, scheduled C-section on November 5th](https://fathom.video/share/ikp5BS7xRwX2bK8rXs1xyf9o3RRUeeeV?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [Daniel shared challenges with fundraising and competition in the market](https://fathom.video/share/ikp5BS7xRwX2bK8rXs1xyf9o3RRUeeeV?tab=summary&timestamp=3973.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jose to complete time series implementation](https://fathom.video/share/ikp5BS7xRwX2bK8rXs1xyf9o3RRUeeeV?tab=summary&timestamp=1960.0)
  - [Jose to start building frontend for private area](https://fathom.video/share/ikp5BS7xRwX2bK8rXs1xyf9o3RRUeeeV?tab=summary&timestamp=1960.0)
  - [Daniel to create seed prompts for subcategories](https://fathom.video/share/ikp5BS7xRwX2bK8rXs1xyf9o3RRUeeeV?tab=summary&timestamp=3924.0)
  - [Daniel to pursue hiring Jacopo and potentially Isaac](https://fathom.video/share/ikp5BS7xRwX2bK8rXs1xyf9o3RRUeeeV?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
  - [Team to focus on shipping public area by end of month](https://fathom.video/share/ikp5BS7xRwX2bK8rXs1xyf9o3RRUeeeV?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Plan for Jacopo to join and familiarize with project before Jose's paternity leave](https://fathom.video/share/ikp5BS7xRwX2bK8rXs1xyf9o3RRUeeeV?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
